_comment: REAL captured cross-filing restatement (never hand-typed), machine-captured exact-integer via edgartools extract_dimensional_revenue. INTC ClientComputingGroup segment revenue for FY2020 (period_end 2020-12-26) was RECAST between the FY2021 10-K (accession 0000050863-22-000007, filed 2022-01-27, value 40057000000.0) and the FY2022 10-K (accession 0000050863-23-000006, filed 2023-01-27, value 40535000000.0): SAME (concept, dimensions, consolidation, period_end), DIFFERENT value, DIFFERENT accession. Verified live 2026-07-15. Overlap policy C keeps the most-recently-filed value and emits a restatement DQC flag.
